extDescription.message: Take control of YouTube. Hide what you don't want to see.

hideRecientesDesc.message: Removes the "Latest / Most relevant" shelf from the feed

hideMixesDesc.message: Hides all Mix playlists and Mix videos

autoReloadDesc.message: Reloads when the "Content unavailable" error appears

openVideosTabDesc.message: Clicking a channel opens directly in the "Videos" tab
